data.title: UiPath Announces AI-Powered Orchestration and CX Automation on Salesforce AgentExchange
data.description: UiPath has recently unveiled two new products on AgentExchange, the marketplace facilitated by Salesforce for the agentic era.

data.title: Postman Announces Collaboration with Microsoft to Expand AI Model Choice, Accelerate Developer Workflows, and Unify API Governance
data.description: In San Francisco, Postman, a prominent API platform, revealed a partnership with Microsoft to enhance AI model selection within Postman's Agent Mode, broaden integration within the Microsoft developer community through Postman's Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, and introduce a new API catalog integration with Microsoft Azure API Management that is now generally accessible. These developments provide enterprise development teams with a cohesive, AI-driven approach to API exploration.

data.title: Belden to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: St. Louis-based company Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC), known for its specialty networking solutions worldwide, is scheduled to release its fiscal first quarter results ending on March 29, 2026, before the market opens on Thursday, April 30, 2026. There will be a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time where management will analyze the company's performance. Those interested can access a webcast of the call and presentation materials on the Investor Relations section of Belden's official website.

data.title: PEPE aims for $0.0000065 by June 2026 with 5% surge on $87M volume, signaling technical breakout ahead. Traders watch resistance levels closely.
data.description: A notable increase of 5% in PEPE has led to an upsurge in trading volume reaching $87 million. This surge is indicative of a potential technical breakout pushing towards $0.0000065. However, traders must navigate through a crucial decision point as the current levels pose resistance.

data.title: Beacon Software Acquires E2E Soccer, Expanding Its Soccer Platform to Be the Leading Integrated Solution for Canadian Leagues and Clubs
data.description: In Ottawa, Ontario, Beacon Software, an AI-native technology holding company, revealed its acquisition of E2E Soccer Limited. E2E Soccer, a significant player in competitive youth soccer in Canada, operates the software that manages league competitions and referee collaborations. By 2025, E2E Soccer assisted more than 100 leagues, 7,500 teams, and oversaw 120,000 games throughout Canada. As part of the acquisition, E2E Soccer will join forces with PowerUp Sports, creating Canada's sole comprehensive soccer technology platform.

data.title: Quantum-Si to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Branford, Connecticut - Quantum-Si has announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026. This news indicates a significant event in the company's financial calendar. This update serves as an important marker for investors and stakeholders keen on following up on the company’s performance during this period. The report is expected to provide crucial insights into Quantum-Si's financial standing and trajectory moving forward. It is anticipated that the information shared will have an impact on the perception and value of the company within the market.

data.title: Roku Surpasses 100 Million Streaming Households, a Historic Milestone for the Streaming Era
data.description: In San Jose, California, Roku revealed today that it has exceeded 100 million streaming households globally, showcasing the company’s significant reach and growth. This milestone signifies the increasing preference for streaming as the main method of TV viewing. People across the world utilize Roku streaming players, proprietary Roku TVs, or various Roku TV models created by partnered hardware manufacturers. Roku devices collectively provide access to a wide array of streaming content.

data.title: K1x Secures $175 Million Growth Investment to Scale Digital Infrastructure for Private Market Tax Compliance
data.description: Morristown-based K1x, an AI-driven private markets tax data platform, has revealed the finalization of a significant $175 million growth investment. The funding round was spearheaded by Sumeru Equity Partners, with existing investor Edison Partners also contributing. Following the transaction, Sumeru will hold the majority stake in the company. This marks Edison Partners' third investment in K1x since 2022. The investment aims to propel K1x into the next phase of its expansion plan and drive its mission forward.

data.title: Launch of DTS AutoStage Broadcaster Portal Premium Tier Sets New Radio Intelligence and Measurement Standard
data.description: Xperi Inc. introduced the DTS AutoStage Broadcaster Portal Premium, setting a new standard in radio intelligence. The upgraded broadcaster portal offers advanced listening analytics for radio stations. The premium features will be accessible starting April 16 and will be showcased at Xperi’s booth (#C2259) during the NAB Show Las Vegas from April 18 to 22. The portal is built on the DTS AutoStage platform and aims to provide the most comprehensive and up-to-date analytics in the market.

data.title: Tier 1 MRO to Exhibit at MRO Americas 2026
data.description: Tier 1 MRO is set to showcase its offerings at MRO Americas 2026 from April 21–23 in Orlando, Florida. Visit Booth #1731 to connect with their team. The event will bring together airlines, MRO providers, OEMs, and suppliers, offering a platform for industry networking and collaboration.

data.title: DOGE at critical juncture: $0.14 potential target or $0.06 downside in 60 days, 30% below 200-day avg.
data.description: The popular cryptocurrency Dogecoin is currently trading at a 30% discount compared to its 200-day average. This places DOGE at a critical juncture where its next moves will be crucial. Over the next two months, it will become clear whether Dogecoin will be able to rise above the $0.14 resistance level or if it will experience a significant decline, potentially dropping to as low as $0.06, a level not seen in many years. This pivotal moment will determine the future trajectory of Dogecoin in the near term.

data.title: BIO sees price plummet by 40% to $0.025 following a 46% rally; expected to stabilize around $0.025-0.030 in two weeks.
data.description: A surge of 46% in BIO has led to technical conditions that may not be sustainable, typically resulting in sharp corrections historically. The token is expected to retrace to a support level between $0.025 and $0.030 within the next two weeks as the momentum wanes.

data.title: ENJ aims for $0.12 amid gaming rally surge, with $0.08 breakout leading the way. Momentum indicates target hit in <2 weeks despite consolidation ahead.
data.description: The price of ENJ has surged above $0.08, paving the way for a potential rise to the $0.12 resistance level. The current momentum indicates that this increase could occur within the next two weeks, although some consolidation may be necessary in the short term.

data.title: XRP whales buying at $1.42 signal push to $1.50 target, potential breakout in 48 hours amid retail hesitation.
data.description: Large holders of XRP are accumulating the cryptocurrency at a price of $1.42, contrasting with smaller retail investors who are showing hesitation. This accumulation by XRP whales sets the stage for a potential surge towards $1.50. Technical analysis suggests a breakout could occur in the next 48 hours, indicating a possible significant price movement in the near future.

data.title: SOL surpasses $86 resistance, aiming for $92 in next 2 days. Whale buying boosts momentum, signaling technical breakout.
data.description: Solana has broken past the resistance level of $86.34, supported by significant accumulation by large investors, propelling its momentum towards $92. This breakout is supported by technical analysis, indicating a potential for a continued rally.

data.title: ETH exceeds $2,300, aims for $3,500 in 4 weeks. Technicals favor 75% chance of hitting target.
data.description: Having surpassed the crucial mark of $2,300, Ethereum is now poised for a measured surge towards $3,500, supported by bullish momentum indicators. The technical analysis indicates a high probability of 75% for Ethereum to hit this target.

data.title: Stock BARD could rise by 21%, hitting $0.40 soon, but may dip to $0.29 first in the next two weeks.
data.description: BARD's currently overbought stance implies a possible increase of 21% to reach $0.40, but before any significant rebound occurs, traders should anticipate a revisit of the $0.29 support level.

data.title: BTC surpasses $68K, death cross signals bear market. Institutions sell at $74K resistance, targeting $68K in 5 days for recovery.
data.description: Institutions are rapidly selling off assets to capitalize on the retail fear of missing out at the resistance level of $74,000. It is anticipated that the price will drop to $68,000 within the next five days before showing any signs of significant recovery. This acceleration in the distribution phase signifies a crucial time in the market dynamics, with significant movements expected in the coming days.

data.title: MRD-Driven Oncology Trials: Regulatory, Clinical and Pharmacology Considerations, Upcoming Webinar Hosted by Xtalks
data.description: The upcoming webinar offers attendees an opportunity to enhance their understanding of the role of minimal residual disease (MRD) in oncology programs. Participants will learn how MRD contributes the most value in areas such as dose escalation, dose optimization, expansion cohorts, and registrational strategy. The event aims to provide a clearer framework for evaluating the significance of MRD in these aspects of oncology. Don't miss out on this informative session to deepen your knowledge on MRD and its implications in cancer treatment.
